question: Which products cost more than 50 dollars? List their names.
goldSQL: SELECT name FROM products WHERE price > 50

question: How many users are there?
goldSQL: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM users

question: What is the total revenue from all payments that have been paid?
goldSQL: SELECT SUM(amount) AS total FROM payments WHERE status = 'paid'

question: List each order id and the name of the user who placed it.
goldSQL: SELECT o.id, u.name FROM orders o JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.id

question: How many orders did each user place? Show the user name and the order count.
goldSQL: SELECT u.name, COUNT(o.id) AS order_count FROM users u JOIN orders o ON o.user_id = u.id GROUP BY u.name

question: List all product names ordered by price, cheapest first.
goldSQL: SELECT name FROM products ORDER BY price ASC

question: Which users have never placed an order? List their names.
goldSQL: SELECT name FROM users WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT user_id FROM orders)

question: Which products are tagged BOTH 'work-from-home' AND 'premium'? List their names.
goldSQL: SELECT p.name FROM products p JOIN product_tags pt ON pt.product_id = p.id JOIN tags t ON t.id = pt.tag_id WHERE t.name IN ('work-from-home', 'premium') GROUP BY p.id, p.name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT t.name) = 2

question: Which products cost more than the average product price? List their names.
goldSQL: SELECT name FROM products WHERE price > (SELECT AVG(price) FROM products)

question: Which categories have more than 3 products? Show the category name and the product count.
goldSQL: SELECT c.name, COUNT(p.id) AS n FROM categories c JOIN products p ON p.category_id = c.id GROUP BY c.name HAVING COUNT(p.id) > 3

question: Which products have at least 3 reviews? Show the product name and the number of reviews.
goldSQL: SELECT p.name, COUNT(r.id) AS n FROM products p JOIN reviews r ON r.product_id = p.id GROUP BY p.name HAVING COUNT(r.id) >= 3

question: For each product category, what is the total revenue from order items (quantity times unit price)? Show the category name and the total.
goldSQL: SELECT c.name, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS revenue FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON p.id = oi.product_id JOIN categories c ON c.id = p.category_id GROUP BY c.name

question: List each subcategory and the name of its parent category.
goldSQL: SELECT c.name, p.name AS parent FROM categories c JOIN categories p ON c.parent_id = p.id

question: Which shipments have shipped but not been delivered yet? List their tracking numbers.
goldSQL: SELECT tracking_number FROM shipments WHERE shipped_at IS NOT NULL AND delivered_at IS NULL

question: Which products are tagged 'work-from-home' but NOT 'premium'? List their names.
goldSQL: SELECT p.name FROM products p JOIN product_tags pt ON pt.product_id = p.id JOIN tags t ON t.id = pt.tag_id WHERE t.name = 'work-from-home' AND p.id NOT IN (SELECT pt2.product_id FROM product_tags pt2 JOIN tags t2 ON t2.id = pt2.tag_id WHERE t2.name = 'premium')

question: Which order has the highest total value (sum of quantity times unit price across its items)? Give just the order id.
goldSQL: SELECT order_id FROM order_items GROUP BY order_id ORDER BY SUM(quantity * unit_price) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many different countries do our users come from?
goldSQL: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT country) AS n FROM users

question: What are the 3 most expensive products? List their names, most expensive first.
goldSQL: SELECT name FROM products ORDER BY price DESC LIMIT 3

question: Who is the current CEO of Google?
How many orders contain more than two distinct products?
goldSQL: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM (SELECT order_id FROM order_items GROUP BY order_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT product_id) > 2) t

question: List the names of products priced above the average price of their category.
goldSQL: SELECT p.name FROM products p WHERE p.price > (SELECT AVG(p2.price) FROM products p2 WHERE p2.category_id = p.category_id)

question: For each category that has a parent category, show the category name and its parent category's name. Exclude top-level categories that have no parent.
goldSQL: SELECT c.name AS category, p.name AS parent FROM categories c JOIN categories p ON p.id = c.parent_id

question: Which categories have at least 3 products and an average product price above 40? List the category names.
goldSQL: SELECT c.name FROM products p JOIN categories c ON c.id = p.category_id GROUP BY c.id, c.name HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3 AND AVG(p.price) > 40

question: How many shipments have been shipped but not yet delivered?
goldSQL: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM shipments WHERE shipped_at IS NOT NULL AND delivered_at IS NULL

question: How many products have an average review rating above 4?
goldSQL: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM (SELECT product_id FROM reviews GROUP BY product_id HAVING AVG(rating) > 4) t

question: Which product has the highest total quantity sold across all orders? Give its name.
goldSQL: SELECT p.name FROM products p JOIN order_items oi ON oi.product_id = p.id GROUP BY p.id, p.name ORDER BY SUM(oi.quantity) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many more orders are completed than cancelled?
goldSQL: SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'completed') - COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'cancelled') AS diff FROM orders

question: How many products have never been reviewed?
goldSQL: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM products p WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM reviews r WHERE r.product_id = p.id)

question: List the names of products that have been ordered but never reviewed.
goldSQL: SELECT name FROM products WHERE id IN (SELECT product_id FROM order_items EXCEPT SELECT product_id FROM reviews)

question: What is the largest number of distinct products in any single order?
goldSQL: SELECT MAX(c) AS m FROM (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT product_id) AS c FROM order_items GROUP BY order_id) t

question: How many orders have had at least one item returned?
goldSQL: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT oi.order_id) AS n FROM returns r JOIN order_items oi ON oi.id = r.order_item_id

question: How many coupons have been used at least once?
goldSQL: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM coupons WHERE used_count > 0

question: How many orders used a coupon?
goldSQL: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM orders WHERE coupon_id IS NOT NULL

question: Which product has the most reviews? Give its name.
goldSQL: SELECT p.name FROM products p JOIN reviews r ON r.product_id = p.id GROUP BY p.id, p.name ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the total amount of paid payments for orders that used a coupon?
goldSQL: SELECT SUM(pmt.amount) AS s FROM payments pmt JOIN orders o ON o.id = pmt.order_id WHERE pmt.status = 'paid' AND o.coupon_id IS NOT NULL

question: Which supplier provides the most products? Give the supplier's name.
goldSQL: SELECT s.name FROM suppliers s JOIN products p ON p.supplier_id = s.id GROUP BY s.id, s.name ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many distinct products appear on at least one wishlist?
goldSQL: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT product_id) AS n FROM wishlists

question: For each category, give its name and the name of its most expensive product.
goldSQL: SELECT c.name AS category, p.name AS product FROM products p JOIN categories c ON c.id = p.category_id WHERE p.price = (SELECT MAX(p2.price) FROM products p2 WHERE p2.category_id = p.category_id)
